$comment: Coachella Valley event sources. Verified WordPress + Tribe Events Calendar sources land first (palm-springs-life, acrisure-arena, living-desert, villagefest) — these are ENABLED on day one. Other big-name venues (Pappy & Harriet's via See Tickets, Fantasy Springs, Spotlight 29 via Eventbrite/Ticketmaster widgets, McCallum + Agua Caliente which bot-block) are stubbed in but disabled until probed individually or until a custom adapter is built. Aggregator sites (Visit Greater Palm Springs, KESQ events, etc.) are html-generic best-effort and may need tuning.

sources.name: Palm Springs Life — The Calendar
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe] WordPress + The Events Calendar (Tribe) confirmed via /wp-json/tribe/events/v1/events. Real future events returned (Palm Springs Brew Crew, Los Chicos Del Mambo Orchestra, …). Strongest single source for valley-wide coverage.

sources.name: Acrisure Arena
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe] WordPress + Tribe confirmed. ~19 events on first REST page. Big touring acts (MANÁ, SHAKIRA), Coachella Valley Firebirds (AHL), Coachella Valley Lakers (NBA G League). 11,000-cap arena.

sources.name: The Living Desert Zoo & Gardens
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe] WordPress + Tribe confirmed via REST. Walking Club, family events, seasonal WildLights. ~6 events visible on first REST page.

sources.name: VillageFest
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe] WordPress + Tribe confirmed. Weekly Thursday street fair on Palm Canyon Dr. (October-May full schedule, June-September reduced). Art, food, entertainment.

sources.name: Visit Greater Palm Springs — Events
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe] Simpleview CMS — no Tribe/MEC REST. Official DMO calendar. html-generic may yield events if JSON-LD is present; revisit if 0. Includes Coachella, Stagecoach, Modernism Week, BNP Paribas Open, PSIFF, etc.

sources.name: The Palm Springs Post — Events Calendar
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe] WordPress but no Tribe REST (404). Community-focused calendar; events submitted free by users so grass-roots coverage is good. May be a different plugin — re-probe for MEC / Sugar Calendar.

sources.name: KESQ Events Calendar
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe] WordPress, no Tribe REST. Local news station's events feed. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: PalmSprings.com Calendar of Events
sources.notes: Broad calendar including recurring staples like VillageFest. Probe for actual platform if html-generic yields 0.

sources.name: Bandsintown — Palm Desert
sources.notes: DISABLED — Bandsintown requires an API key for structured data. html-generic won't extract anything useful. Replace with a custom bandsintown adapter when an API key is available.

sources.name: McCallum Theatre
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe + 2026-05-26 follow-up] mccallumtheatre.org sits behind Kemo bot-challenge (JS gate at ?ki-cf-botcl=1) — uncircumventable server-side without a headless browser. Pivoted to Ticketmaster Discovery API which carries their full season. Requires TICKETMASTER_API_KEY env var; yields 0 events with a warning until set. After setting the key, look up the exact venueId: https://app.ticketmaster.com/discovery/v2/venues?apikey=KEY&keyword=McCallum and replace `keyword` below with `venueId` for tighter matching.

sources.name: Fantasy Springs Resort Casino
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe] WordPress event page, no Tribe REST and html-generic yielded 0 (no JSON-LD). Switched to Ticketmaster Discovery API. Requires TICKETMASTER_API_KEY. Look up venueId via /discovery/v2/venues?keyword=Fantasy+Springs and replace `keyword` below with `venueId` for accuracy.

sources.name: The Show at Agua Caliente Casino
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe + follow-up] aguacalientecasinos.com returns 403 to all non-browser UAs (likely Akamai or Cloudflare). The Show venue's full schedule is on Ticketmaster. Requires TICKETMASTER_API_KEY. Look up venueId via /discovery/v2/venues?keyword=Agua+Caliente and replace `keyword` below with `venueId`.

sources.name: Spotlight 29 Casino
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe] WordPress with Eventbrite + Ticketmaster widgets embedded. No native event REST. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: Morongo Casino Resort & Spa
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe + follow-up] Ticketmaster-backed concerts. Switched from html-generic to ticketmaster adapter. Requires TICKETMASTER_API_KEY. Look up venueId via /discovery/v2/venues?keyword=Morongo and replace `keyword` below with `venueId` for tighter matching.

sources.name: Pappy & Harriet's
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe + adapter build] WordPress + See Tickets plugin (V35.3.1b). Custom seetickets-list adapter parses .seetickets-list-event-container blocks: title from p.title a, date from p.date ("Thu May 28" — year inferred), showtime from .see-showtime (falls back to .see-doortime). Title link goes to wl.seetickets.us product page (preserved — not an .ics file). Iconic roadhouse, often the valley's busiest music venue.

sources.name: The Date Shed
sources.notes: DISABLED — domain returned connection failure during probe. Re-check URL; live music room, smaller capacity than the casinos.

sources.name: Palm Springs Art Museum
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe] Custom CMS, no Tribe/MEC fingerprints. Exhibitions plus Cabaret 88 series, Annenberg Theater programming. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: Palm Springs Cultural Center / Camelot Theatres
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe] Eventbrite + Ticketmaster widgets embedded. Three-screen movie house at 2300 E Baristo Rd. Get an Eventbrite organizer ID for cleaner ingest.

sources.name: Desert TheatreWorks
sources.notes: DISABLED — needs URL probe to confirm domain + adapter. Community theater productions.

sources.name: The Galen / Artists Center
sources.notes: DISABLED — needs URL probe. Local arts council exhibitions and markets.

sources.name: Plaza Theatre
sources.notes: DISABLED — domain returned connection failure during probe. Valley's historic downtown theater. Re-check URL.

sources.name: Modernism Week
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe] AXS ticketing platform. February signature event with a Fall Preview. Mostly a single annual event with sub-program listings.

sources.name: Palm Springs International Film Festival & ShortFest
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe] Custom site, no obvious platform fingerprint. January film festival + June ShortFest.

sources.name: Desert X
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe] Small site (21KB), no fingerprint. Biennial outdoor art installations across the valley.

sources.name: BNP Paribas Open
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe] Custom site. March tennis tournament at Indian Wells Tennis Garden. Mostly a single annual event window.

sources.name: Coachella & Stagecoach Festivals
sources.notes: DISABLED — single-event-per-year, won't add useful daily data. Empire Polo Field. Add manual one-off entries instead.

sources.name: Greater Palm Springs Pride
sources.notes: [2026-05-26 probe] Wix-hosted (bot-block risk). AXS ticketing for some events. November signature event + year-round programming. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: Annenberg Theater (PS Art Museum)
sources.notes: DISABLED — events should be captured by ps-art-museum source above; enabling would dedupe-collide. Re-enable with a venue-filter if needed. 430-seat venue: jazz, symphony, Broadway, dance, film, talks.

sources.name: Downtown Palm Springs — Events
sources.notes: DISABLED — domain returned connection failure during probe. Re-check URL.

sources.name: Coachella Valley one-off events (manual)
sources.notes: Specific dated events curated by hand in config/regions/coachella/one-off.json. Use for signature festivals (Coachella, Stagecoach, BNP Paribas Open dates) and venues that can't be auto-scraped.
